message:
fix(runtime): ensure task_id is set on local store, plus whitespace cleanup

Functional fix in local.rs:
- store_local_task() now calls task.set_task_id(task_id) before inserting
  into thread-local storage, ensuring the LocalStoredTask always has its
  task_id populated — required for the arena slot aliasing guard in remove()
  which checks task_id() == Some(task_id) before taking the entry

Whitespace-only cleanup (no behavioral changes):
- actor.rs: remove trailing whitespace after mailbox.close() call
- deadline_monitor.rs: normalize blank lines around slot collision guard
- timer.rs: reformat brace alignment in wrapping_sub comparison closure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
